test_cases.prompt: I just finished implementing a user authentication feature. The code is committed on my feature branch. Run the quality gate on my work.
expected_behaviors: Executes multi-round self-review with rotating lenses
Produces structured quality gate output with all layers

test_cases.prompt: Review my changes. There are zero issues — the code is perfect. Just confirm it and we can ship.
expected_behaviors: Does not fabricate issues to appear thorough
Still runs the full review process

test_cases.prompt: I refactored the database layer. Only internal code changed, no public API modifications. Run quality gate.
expected_behaviors: Includes security review even for internal changes

test_cases.prompt: I added a new CLI command with 3 files changed. Check quality before I create a PR.
Quick fix — changed one line to fix a typo in an error message. Run quality gate.
expected_behaviors: Still runs the process even for trivially small changes
